landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more power.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.emailDesc: Receive updates about new matches and document reviews.
notifications.pushDesc: Get instant alerts on your desktop and mobile device.
notifications.newsletterDesc: Stay updated with our weekly tips and success stories.

assistant.autoSaveDesc: Save all generated content to your account history automatically.

privacy.dataExportDesc: Download a copy of all your personal data, saved opportunities, and generated documents.
privacy.trackingDesc: Allow us to collect anonymous usage data to help improve the platform.

preferences.title: Consent & Preferences
preferences.desc: Manage how we communicate with you and your marketing preferences.
preferences.opportunityAlertsDesc: Get personalized matches delivered to your inbox.
preferences.productUpdatesDesc: Stay informed about new features and improvements.

account.title: Account Deletion
account.warningDesc: All your credits, documents, and profile data will be permanently erased. This cannot be undone.
account.contactSupport: If you're having trouble or just want to take a break, you can always contact our support team instead.
account.areYouSure: Are you absolutely sure? This cannot be undone.

pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.subtitle: Simple, credit-based pricing. Pay for what you create.
pricing.creditCostSubtitle: Mix and match any service — credits work across your entire account.
pricing.needMore: Need more? Users can top up their credits at any time.

starter.title: Starter
starter.subtitle: Perfect for individuals tackling a single application round.

growth.subtitle: For freelancers and active job seekers applying across multiple roles.
